body:
```
$ go test .

        	            	        /Users/cian/src/cdr/coder/coderd/azureidentity/azureidentity.go:61
        	            	  - x509: malformed certificate
        	Test:       	TestValidate
FAIL
FAIL	github.com/coder/coder/coderd/azureidentity	0.326s
FAIL
```

title: test flake: coderd/azureidentity TestValidate fails with x509 malformed certificate error
